LandingPage.description: Rent a high-end cloud rig by the hour, unlock unlimited sessions with a subscription, and keep the whole billing flow inside Stripe test mode.
LandingPage.galleryDescription: A small fictional catalog gives the product a real SaaS shape while the payments stay fully sandboxed.
LandingPage.galleryTitle: Make the billing demo feel like a product people would actually browse.
LandingPage.pricingDescription: Use this project as a realistic SaaS billing playground: model one-time play-hour packs, recurring subscriptions, invoices, customer portal access and authenticated account flows without charging real cards.
LandingPage.pricingTitle: A billing surface built to demonstrate Stripe inside a SaaS product.
LandingPage.stepsTitle: Simple enough for a demo. Real enough for Stripe.
LandingPage.title: Rent a cloud gaming rig in seconds.
steps: Choose a game from the catalog.

Launch a session from the dashboard.

HomePage.description: This protected area turns the Stripe sandbox into a real product surface: sessions, credits, subscriptions and billing actions all live around the game catalog.
HomePage.overviewTitle: Everything a SaaS billing dashboard needs before real money enters the picture.
